goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion decision 写入层

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 canary 转正决策写入
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision.ts 受控 CLI/函数和 focused tests。它复用 memory-canary-promotion preview，把 pass canary 记录成 promotable decision，把 fail、insufficient_samples、source_missing、admission_failed 记录成 blocked decision；默认 dry-run 不建表，--write 只写 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions，--list 缺表返回空且不建表。src/catty/README.md 同步新增入口、边界和 Spike D 状态。
summary.why: 前序切片已经有持久 canary queue、只读 eval 和 promotion preview，但 preview 结果仍是 ephemeral JSON。Catty v0 要接近真实 dogfood，需要先有可审计的 promotion/block decision 记录层，作为未来转正或 nightly runner 的输入，同时继续避免把 prediction/judgement 或 canary eval 直接写成用户长期 memory。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion decision 写入层

decisions.chose: 只做 promotion decision audit 写入层，不更新 canary status、不写 catty_memory_audit、不写用户长期 memory、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: decision audit 是 promotion preview 之后、真实 memory write 之前的审计层；状态推进和真实转正需要后续独立协议。

decisions.chose: 复用 previewMemoryCanaryPromotions 输出，而不是重新计算 canary eval 或 admission。
decisions.rationale: 保持 canary eval、promotion preview、decision write 三层口径一致，避免 Goodhart/漂移诊断出现两套 guardrail 定义。

decisions.chose: 新增 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions 表，按 canary id upsert decision、status、reason、proposed memory、evidence summary 和 guardrail status。
decisions.rationale: 这保留足够审计上下文，后续可以判断为什么某个 canary 可转正或被阻止，同时不污染 catty_memory_audit 或用户 memory。

decisions.chose: 把既有 Catty proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 前序 intents 分别完成 trail、judge、store、shadow CLI、memory candidate、canary queue、canary eval 和 promotion preview；本轮只在其后补 decision write，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: pass canary 时直接写用户长期 memory
rejected.reason: 会跳过真实 promotion/审计边界，把 evaluation 结果误当 admitted user prior。
planned -> promoted/blocked 的状态协议还未定义，直接改状态会制造误导性 side effect。

rejected.alternative: 在 decision 写入层重新计算 guardrails
rejected.reason: 会分叉 canary eval 口径；本轮应只持久化 preview 已得出的 decision。

acknowledged_constraints.note: --write 只写 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions，不写用户长期 memory。
没有接 launchd heartbeat，也没有新增模型调用路径。
既有 CLAUDE.md dirty 未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录该边界。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision.test.ts 先失败于缺少 ./memory-canary-promotion-decision 模块。
验证通过：focused promotion decision test 3 pass，23 expect。
验证通过：canary promotion 相关 tests 14 pass，98 expect。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts 34 pass，210 expect。
验证通过：bun test 39 pass，224 expect。
CLI smoke：--help 输出 usage；live dry-run 返回 total=0/promotable=0/blocked=0；live --list 返回 decisions=[]。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，last full pipeline ok/throttled。
提交 c6b9bdc 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty。

subsystems: Catty v0 memory canary promotion decision audit
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has a durable decision audit layer after promotion preview and before any real user memory write.
Promotion decisions are derived from previewMemoryCanaryPromotions, preserving a single canary eval and promotion guardrail source of truth.
Promotable and blocked decisions are persisted separately from catty_memory_audit and catty_memory_canaries.status.
Decision listing is read-only and missing-table safe, so observability checks do not create Catty tables.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision.ts prints dry-run promotable/blocked decisions by default.
--write persists decisions to catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions only when preview output has decisions.
--list reads persisted decisions and returns an empty list without creating tables when no decision table exists.
Persisted promotable decisions include proposedMemory and evidenceSummary; blocked decisions include status, reason, failedGuardrails and guardrailStatus.
Writing decisions does not mutate catty_memory_canaries.status, catty_memory_audit, or user memory.

data_model_changes.name: catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions
data_model_changes.location: SQLite DB selected by --store-db when --write has decisions
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Created lazily with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only during explicit --write with non-empty decisions.

security_implications: The command reads only Catty canary/prediction tables through existing preview helpers and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command performs no model calls and has no --pi path.
The command writes only decision audit state and never writes user memory, catty_memory_audit, or canary status.
migration_notes: No destructive migration is required; the decision table is additive and created lazily.
Existing memory-canary, memory-canary-eval and memory-canary-promotion CLIs are unchanged.
